target: 35. Capture the Shadow
Ryunosuke Minakata
(The layout of the third floor is... three closets, a toilet... and the master bedroom. There's a balcony...)
(And next to it is the children's room... A corner room with two windows...)
(On the north side—there's a balcony here too... The window is slightly open...)
(I should send an additional message. Third floor, north window...)
Taking my back is useless.
After emitting the copying light, you're unable to move for a few seconds.
It seems it takes quite a bit of effort to scan the information of a single human...
Do you think I'd miss that moment?
The moment you try to copy me! I'll kill you... this time for sure.
…How boring.
Shinpei Ajiro
Just as Shinpei Ajiro said, I will likely end up letting Shiori escape.
Hey, hey... You're actually believing this guy and his nonsense...?
Thinking weak thoughts about how it might fail before you even try is exactly why you end up failing!!?
Ridiculous...!! This has nothing to do with that Showa-era willpower nonsense.
Grr...

Don't misunderstand.
I have no intention of letting Shiori escape.
I will move "inside" the house exactly as before, but I want you two to take different actions "outside"!
This is the important part... I had planned for Nezu to wait around the back on the south side as backup.
This is because it's a position with a clear view of the kitchen and bathroom windows, as well as the front door...
But that allowed it to escape... I can't completely rule out the bathroom window, but...
It's highly likely that it didn't escape from the second floor.
I surmise it used Shiori's room on the third floor.
Because only Shiori's room has a window facing "north"...
When I give the signal, grab your weapons and wait at the front of the house.
Nezu-san, a Shadow is coming from the window!
So it's here...! This is—
"<color=#GF_TIPS_111>Plan B</color>"...!!
I thought I pinned it down... Did I miss the third shot...!! In that case—
Bring it on!!!!
(...! It's coming this way...!!)
(Which means it hasn't noticed me hiding here...!)
(If I'm gonna move, it's now...!)
(What do I do...? It's still too far to shoot...!? In that case... should I jump it and seal its movements!?)
(This is my first time firing a nail gun... What if I miss here...? No, this is no time to be thinking!)
(It's getting closer!! I have to... steel my resolve!!)
(It noticed me!!)
(I don't have time to hesitate!)
(It's now or never...!! Shoot it, me!!)
(I missed!!)
(I-I have to do something...!!)
(But what can I—)
Out of the way!!
Hah!!?
Its feet stopped!! Shinpei-san!!
Daaamn it!!
Hah!!?
Guh... Oooohhh!!!!
...You!! Did you do it!?
You're creeping me out... Let go, idiot!
Did you... kill Ushio!!!!
That's enough... Let go, Shinpei...!!
I pierced the Shadow with a nail.
It can't even move a single finger anymore...
One or two won't do it...
You gotta hit three spots like that... If you pierce a Shadow with nails or stakes...
They'll be pinned in place...!! Meaning they can be captured...!!
C-Capture!! So Plan B was... Was that your intention from the start!?
Yup.
I-I didn't know!
Course I didn't tell ya! I didn't expect anything from you from the start!
(Ugh... this old geezer...!!)
(No, but this is amazing! To think we could capture Shiori...)
(This will change the future! ...For sure!!)
Why did you jump at it?
That's... I just chose the more reliable method.
I figured if I could stop the Shadow's movement even a little, Nezu-san would definitely take care of it.
Mm…
Well, in other words... It was a spur-of-the-moment action.
I see... Shadows can submerge their 3D forms into 2D surfaces and move quickly.
...However, it seems that if their 3D form is grabbed, they can no longer submerge.
This is a new discovery, Shinpei-san!! Thanks to you, it didn't get away!
Just the two of us would have failed after all, right? Nezu-san.
Hmph! ...You've got some guts for a young guy...
Not bad.
(Nezu-san...)
Ufufufufufufufufufufufufu.
Ufu! Ufufufufufufufu.
What's so funny?
...You two. This one is somehow different from the other Shadows.
I changed the plan to capturing it because I wanted to investigate it.
Something is different...?
First, I'd like it to answer Shinpei-san's question from earlier...
Did you kill Ushio Kofune and give birth to her Shadow?
Ah~~... Ushio-oneechan...?
Yeah, I killed her. I strangled her to death.
...You... killed her...?

Shinpei-san.
Stay calm.
Why!? Why did you do that to Ushio...
What the hell are you guys doing!!!? Killing people and taking their places... What is your goal!!!!
It's over... this summer. It's already over.
That's why we're going home. We're going home as a family.
...What? What on earth are you talking about?
Kukukukuku... Please don't be so scared...
Shinpei-san... You're misunderstanding.
The human me was definitely killed by a Shadow, but I don't really resent the Shadows... I'm not scared anymore either...
The Shadow copied me perfectly...
My body, my mind, and my memories. That's why I'm Shiori Kobayakawa.
I was just reborn…
Don't lie!!!! You're not Shiori-chan!!
Shiori-chan! Her family! You're the one who killed them!!
You should become a Shadow soon too, Shinpei-san...
Okay? Become my big brother.
Ufu... Ahahahaha, ahahahahaha... fufu!
Ugh...!
Ahahahahahahaha! Hahaha, fufufu, ahaha—!
Let's stop here... If you talk to a Shadow for too long, you'll be led astray.
...Damn it...
(The culprit who killed Ushio...!! I thought I would kill them when I found them...)
(If it was a monster, I wouldn't hesitate...)
(But having it appear right in front of me like this... taking the form of a neighborhood kid I've known since they were little...)
(Far from killing it... I couldn't even throw a punch...!!)
